insights: BMI: 22.9 (Normal). Healthy weight range. Maintain with balanced diet and activity.
Your Basal Metabolic Rate is 1689 kcal/day — calories your body burns at complete rest.
Your TDEE is 2913 kcal/day — total daily burn at your activity level (Very Active (hard exercise 6-7 days/week)).
Your personalised calorie target is 3213 kcal/day to muscle gain (lean bulk).
Daily macro targets — Protein: 281.1g | Carbs: 361.5g | Fat: 71.4g.
Ideal body weight (Devine formula): 70.5 kg. Your current weight is 70.0 kg.
Recommended daily water intake: 2712 ml (2.7 litres).
Hypertension: Sodium target 1500 mg/day. Follow DASH principles — increase fruits, vegetables, and whole grains.
tips: Eat protein within 30-60 minutes after strength training.
Spread protein intake evenly across all meals for optimal synthesis.
Don't skip meals — muscle gain requires consistent calorie surplus.
Prioritise sleep — 80% of growth hormone is released during deep sleep.
Aim for 38g fibre/day — include vegetables, dals, and whole grains.
Target 2.7 litres of water daily, more if exercising.
Include a source of colour at every meal — red/orange/green vegetables.
Limit ultra-processed foods — they are high in sodium, sugar, and unhealthy fats.
Plan meals in advance to avoid last-minute poor food choices.
Combine plant proteins at each meal (e.g. dal + rice, chapati + rajma) for a complete amino acid profile.
